message:
feat(runtime): add RuntimeDiffConfig and integrate diff strategy into TerminalWriter

Implement runtime-level configuration for Bayesian diff strategy selection
and wire DiffStrategySelector into TerminalWriter. This enables adaptive
buffer diffing that chooses the optimal strategy (Full, DirtyRows, or
FullRedraw) based on expected cost per frame.

RuntimeDiffConfig:
- bayesian_enabled: Toggle Bayesian selection (default: true)
- dirty_rows_enabled: Allow DirtyRows strategy (default: true)
- reset_on_resize: Reset posterior on dimension change (default: true)
- reset_on_invalidation: Reset on buffer invalidation (default: true)
- strategy_config: Underlying DiffStrategyConfig for cost model

Builder Methods:
- with_bayesian_enabled(bool)
- with_dirty_rows_enabled(bool)
- with_reset_on_resize(bool)
- with_reset_on_invalidation(bool)
- with_strategy_config(DiffStrategyConfig)

TerminalWriter Integration:
- New with_diff_config() constructor accepting RuntimeDiffConfig
- decide_diff() method selects strategy and computes diff
- Strategy selection respects config toggles
- Posterior updated via observe() after each frame
- Reset methods respect config flags:
  - reset_diff_strategy(): Respects reset_on_invalidation
  - reset_diff_on_resize(): Respects reset_on_resize

Accessor Methods:
- diff_config() -> &RuntimeDiffConfig
- diff_strategy() -> &DiffStrategySelector
- diff_strategy_mut() -> &mut DiffStrategySelector

Reset Triggers:
- set_size(): Calls reset_diff_on_resize()
- write_log() without scroll region: Calls reset_diff_strategy()
- clear_screen(): Calls reset_diff_strategy()
- Auto UI height changes: Calls reset_diff_strategy()

Tests Added:
- runtime_diff_config_default: Verifies default values
- runtime_diff_config_builder: Tests builder pattern
- with_diff_config_applies_strategy_config: Validates config application
- diff_config_accessor: Tests accessor methods
- log_write_without_scroll_region_resets_diff_strategy
- log_write_with_scroll_region_preserves_diff_strategy
- resize_respects_reset_toggle
- strategy_selection_config_flags_applied

Closes bd-3e1t.1.7 (API: expose diff strategy config).
Closes bd-3e1t.1.4 (wire strategy selection into TerminalWriter).
Closes bd-3e1t.1.8 (handle diff state reset).
Part of bd-3e1t.1 (Bayesian Diff Strategy epic).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
